filename: 26.08.25 Progress on HE and tcycif preprocessing - Ada, Hanna, Zhihan.md
relative_path: 4. Meetings & Updates/Meeting_notes/2025/26.08.25 Progress on HE and tcycif preprocessing - Ada, Hanna, Zhihan.md
full_text:
Deal all, here are our today\'s meeting notes:

For H&E, broad exploration planned: build an atlas of lymphoid
aggregates (LAggs) and TLSs, compare benign vs. cancer, and explore HGSC
sample/genomic group differences.

- Histology integration: HE algorithm (with Kaiyang), alignment of HE
 > and t-CyCIF (Zhihan, Ada).

- Analysis methods: Spacestat (15 μm, 20-cell network cutoffs)

- Experimental directions:

1. TLS+/TLS- samples in t-CyCIF.

2. Benign vs. borderline samples (omentums).

3. LAgg+ benigns to be included in new CyCIF.

- Test Spottedpy (Sara's method from Visium) for hotspot/area-based
 > analysis. Define hotspots/gradients of marker distributions for
 > area-based analysis.

- Check CD138 signal validity (quantification + cross-validation with
 > another data level).

- Annotate stromal vs intratumoral LAggs in GeoMx and integrate into
 > atlas.
